title: cynoglossum alpinum
intro: Cynoglossum alpinum, also known as the Alpine Harebell or Mountain Harebell, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that belongs to the genus Cynoglossum. It is native to mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Cynoglossum alpinum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
